implementation_summary: Extended StructuredContent union and parseStructured dispatch with leave_intent variant. Created LeaveChatAnnouncement presentational component mirroring InviteCancelledChatAnnouncement (gray sidebar, useCopy, data-testid). Added leave_intent render branch to ChatBox.tsx renderStructuredMessage, gated on allowPollMessages consistent with invite_cancelled. Added groups.leftGroup translation key in both en and de. Added 2 unit tests for parseStructured and 1 new i18n test file.
